basic_details.job_title: GSSSB Junior Industry Inspector Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 60 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB), Gandhinagar
basic_details.post_name: Junior Industry Inspector (Junior Udyog Nirikshak) - Class-3
basic_details.department: Office of the Industries Commissioner, Gandhinagar (Industries and Mines Department)
basic_details.short_information: GSSSB is recruiting 60 Junior Udyog Nirikshak (Class-3) posts under the Industries and Mines Department; last date 20 June 2026.

application_fee.details: Note: | Fee must be paid online only - by Debit Card, Internet Banking, UPI, or Wallet. Fee payment deadline: 22-06-2026 at 23:59 hrs. Candidates who appear for the exam will get the fee refunded. Candidates who do not appear for the exam will NOT get a refund. Applications without fee payment will be automatically cancelled. Transaction charges are payable additionally by the candidate.

age_limit.details: Age calculated as on 20-06-2026. | Minimum age: 18 years as on 20-06-2026.

qualification.details: Candidates must possess: | (i) A Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology (excluding Civil Engineering) from a recognized University/institution under UGC Act, 1956; | OR | (ii) A Diploma in Engineering or Technology (excluding Civil Engineering) from the Technical Examination Board or a recognized institution, with about 2 years of practical work experience as a technical worker (not as labour) in Government, Government undertaking, Board, or any large-scale industry/company under the Companies Act, 2013; | AND | (iii) Basic knowledge of computer application as prescribed in Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules, 1967; | AND | (iv) Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both. | Note: Candidates without computer knowledge certificate at the time of application may still apply, but must produce the certificate before appointment, otherwise their selection will be cancelled. | Eligible Engineering/Technology branches include (selected): | Automobile, Chemical, Electrical, Electronics, Information Technology, Instrumentation, Mechatronics, Metallurgy, Plastic, Mechanical, Rubber, Computer, Textile, Printing - and all their specializations as listed in the detailed notification. Civil Engineering is excluded.

vacancy_details.Disability Types Accepted: OA, OL, LC, BA, BL, Dw, AAV, SD, SI

salary_details.first 5 years: Fixed pay of ₹40,800/- per month (as per Finance Dept. resolution dated 18.10.2023)
salary_details.after 5 years (on satisfactory service): 7th Pay Commission Level-5: ₹29,200/- to ₹92,300/- (subject to Supreme Court SLP No.14124/2012 and 14125/2012)

selection_process: Stage 1 MCQ-based CBRT/OMR Competitive Written Examination (Part-A + Part-B)
Stage 2 Certificate Verification (approx. 2x candidates per vacancy called)
Final Selection Merit list prepared on the basis of total marks obtained in the competitive exam

Provisional answer key will be published on the GSSSB website after the exam. Candidates can submit objections. Final answer key will be released after considering objections. If a question is cancelled in the final answer key
marks will be recalculated on a pro-rata basis.

pattern_table.Subject: Indian Constitution, Current Affairs, Gujarati & English Comprehension
Questions related to relevant subject and its applications

exam_pattern.details: The examination will be a single-stage MCQ-based CBRT/OMR competitive exam with two parts in one question paper. Total duration: 3 hours (180 minutes). Negative marking: 1/4 mark deducted for each wrong answer. | Part-A (General/Aptitude): | Part-B (Subject/Technical): | Total: 210 questions / 210 marks / 180 minutes | Minimum qualifying standard: 40% marks in both Part-A and Part-B separately (applies to all categories). | Additional marks (bonus 5%) for: | Widow candidates (5% of total marks obtained added to merit) Sports persons who represented at National/International, Inter-University, or All India School level (5% of total marks obtained added to merit)

how_to_apply: Only online applications are accepted. No other mode will be entertained.
Click on "Online Application" → Apply → Select GSSSB
Click on Advertisement No. 423/202627 - Junior Udyog Nirikshak Class-3 → "Apply Now"
Fill in Personal Details (fields marked with are mandatory)
Note down the Application Number generated
Upload Photograph (5 cm height × 3.6 cm width; JPG; max 15 KB; white background; dated within 1 year of last date) and Signature (2.5 cm height × 7.5 cm width; JPG; max 15 KB)
Confirm Application → Note the Confirmation Number (mandatory for all further steps)
Pay exam fee online before 22-06-2026 at 23:59 hrs → Save fee receipt
Print and save the application form
Important: Only the last confirmed application will be valid if multiple applications are submitted. Category once confirmed cannot be changed. No changes are possible after confirmation.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for GSSSB Junior Industry Inspector (Junior Udyog Nirikshak) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 20 June 2026 at 23:59 hrs at https://ojas.gujarat.gov.in. The last date to pay the exam fee online is 22 June 2026 at 23:59 hrs. Candidates are advised to apply well before the closing date and not wait till the last moment.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Junior Udyog Nirikshak Class-3 in GSSSB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 60 vacancies have been announced for Junior Industry Inspector (Junior Udyog Nirikshak) Class-3 under the Office of the Industries Commissioner, Gandhinagar. The number of vacancies may increase or decrease. Divyang reserved posts will be advertised separately.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Junior Industry Inspector (Junior Udyog Nirikshak) in GSSSB 2026?
faq.answer: For the first 5 years, selected candidates will receive a fixed pay of ₹40,800/- per month. After 5 years, on satisfactory service, they will be regularized at 7th Pay Commission Level-5 (₹29,200/- to ₹92,300/-), subject to Supreme Court orders in SLP No. 14124/2012 and 14125/2012.

faq.question: Q4. Is Civil Engineering eligible for GSSSB Junior Udyog Nirikshak 2026?
faq.answer: No. Civil Engineering is specifically excluded from the eligible qualifications. Only B.E./B.Tech. or Diploma in Engineering/Technology in branches other than Civil Engineering are eligible. Refer to the detailed list of eligible specializations in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the exam pattern for GSSSB Junior Industry Inspector Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The exam is a single-stage MCQ-based CBRT/OMR exam with two parts - Part-A (90 marks: Logical Tests, Mathematical Tests, Constitution/Current Affairs/Comprehension) and Part-B (120 marks: Subject-related questions). Total: 210 questions, 210 marks, 180 minutes. Negative marking of 1/4 mark per wrong answer applies. Minimum 40% marks required in both parts separately.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for GSSSB Junior Industry Inspector (Junior Udyog Nirikshak) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 20 June 2026 at 23:59 hrs at https://ojas.gujarat.gov.in. The last date to pay the exam fee online is 22 June 2026 at 23:59 hrs. Candidates are advised to apply well before the closing date and not wait till the last moment.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for Junior Udyog Nirikshak Class-3 in GSSSB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 60 vacancies have been announced for Junior Industry Inspector (Junior Udyog Nirikshak) Class-3 under the Office of the Industries Commissioner, Gandhinagar. The number of vacancies may increase or decrease. Divyang reserved posts will be advertised separately.

faq.answer: For the first 5 years, selected candidates will receive a fixed pay of ₹40,800/- per month. After 5 years, on satisfactory service, they will be regularized at 7th Pay Commission Level-5 (₹29,200/- to ₹92,300/-), subject to Supreme Court orders in SLP No. 14124/2012 and 14125/2012.

faq.question: Is Civil Engineering eligible for GSSSB Junior Udyog Nirikshak 2026?
faq.answer: No. Civil Engineering is specifically excluded from the eligible qualifications. Only B.E./B.Tech. or Diploma in Engineering/Technology in branches other than Civil Engineering are eligible. Refer to the detailed list of eligible specializations in the official notification.

faq.answer: The exam is a single-stage MCQ-based CBRT/OMR exam with two parts - Part-A (90 marks: Logical Tests, Mathematical Tests, Constitution/Current Affairs/Comprehension) and Part-B (120 marks: Subject-related questions).
